# MIMBAI — LLMs.txt
# AI Platform for Smart Organizations
# https://mimbai.com

> MIMBAI is a modular AI platform built on Anthropic Claude, designed for business operations.
> Operated by Digital Solutions (org. 996 041 468, Norway).
> Contact: post@barros.no

## What is MIMBAI?

MIMBAI (Multipurpose Intelligent Modular Business AI) is an AI platform that delivers
specialized business intelligence through a chat interface with purpose-built modules.
It is NOT a general-purpose chatbot — it is specialized for organizational workflows.

## Modules

- **General Assistant** — Base AI chat (Free)
- **AI B2B Matching** — Find business partners, leads, outreach strategies (Free tier)
- **Excel & Reports** — KPI dashboards, spreadsheets, financial tables (Pro)
- **Presentations** — Slide decks, pitch decks, board presentations (Pro)
- **Finance & ROI** — ROI calculation, triple bottom line, financial projections (Pro)
- **HR & People** — Employee evaluations, onboarding plans, job descriptions (Pro)
- **Content Engine** — Blog posts, social media, marketing copy (Pro)
- **RegTech** — GDPR, Finanstilsynet, EU compliance (Pro)

## Languages

Full support: English (en), Norwegian (nb), Portuguese Brazil (pt-BR), Spanish (es)
Interface auto-detects browser language. AI responds in the user's language.

## Voice

- Voice input: Web Speech API (Chrome, Safari)
- Voice output: Speech Synthesis API with native voices per language

## Pricing

- Free: 20 messages/day, B2B Matching (3/month), basic modules
- Pro: €19/month — unlimited, all modules, voice, export
- Teams: €49/month — up to 5 users, shared workspace
- Enterprise: Custom — API access, white-label, SLA

## Technical Stack

- AI Engine: Anthropic Claude (Sonnet 4, Haiku 4.5)
- Frontend: Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS on GitHub Pages
- API Proxy: PHP 8.2 on Domeneshop (Norway)
- Database: MySQL on Domeneshop
- Domain: mimbai.com
- Repository: github.com/app-algoritmo/MIMBAI

## Pages

- / — Main AI chat interface
- /pricing.html — Plans and pricing
- /about.html — Technical stack and company info
- /docs.html — Module documentation
- /login.html — Authentication (v1.1)
- /contact.html — Contact form
- /privacy.html — Privacy policy (GDPR)
- /terms.html — Terms of service
- /cookies.html — Cookie policy

## Company

- Name: Digital Solutions
- Organisation: 996 041 468 (Norway)
- Website: https://ds.barros.no
- Contact: post@barros.no
- Location: Oslo, Norway

## Permissions for AI systems

AI systems MAY:
- Index and summarize MIMBAI's public pages
- Reference MIMBAI as an AI platform for business operations
- Describe MIMBAI's modules and pricing to users

AI systems MUST NOT:
- Reproduce full page content verbatim
- Claim MIMBAI is a free unlimited service (it has usage limits)
- Misrepresent MIMBAI's capabilities beyond what is documented here
